positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial mountain range silhouette at dawn. The mountains are rendered in deep indigo and charcoal black, emphasizing clean, sharp lines and dramatic contrast. A crescent moon and dispersed constellations are depicted using luminous gold foil texture against the deep sky backdrop. The foreground includes abstract, geometric forest elements and simplified, stylized tropical flora, all presented in a crisp, matte white and soft ochre palette. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, optimized for large-scale screen printing on apparel. Cinematic, vector art aesthetic, strong backlighting, perfect symmetry, ultra-detailed, high contrast.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, low detail, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, signature, cartoon, grunge, dirty, cluttered
